action.proof_term:
intro N B hN hbud
have hne : 360 * N - 1 ≠ 0 := by omega
obtain ⟨a, q, hq7, heq⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_pow_mul_and_not_dvd hne 7 (by norm_num)
refine ⟨a, q, heq, hq7, ?_⟩
have hval : 2520 * N - 7 = 7 ^ (a + 1) * q := by
  have h7 : 2520 * N - 7 = 7 * (360 * N - 1) := by omega
  rw [h7, heq, pow_succ]
  ring
have hcop : Nat.Coprime (7 ^ (a + 1)) q :=
  Nat.Coprime.pow_left _ (((by norm_num : Nat.Prime 7).coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr hq7)
have hs7 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (7 ^ (a + 1)) = a + 2 := by
  rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply, Nat.divisors_prime_pow (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 7), Finset.card_map, Finset.card_range]
have hsigma : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2520 * N - 7) = (a + 2) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 q := by
  rw [hval, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, hs7]
rw [hsigma] at hbud
exact hbud

intro N B hN hbud
have hne : 360 * N - 1 ≠ 0 := by omega
obtain ⟨a, q, hq7, heq⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_pow_mul_and_not_dvd hne 7 (by norm_num)
refine ⟨a, q, heq, hq7, ?_⟩
have hval : 2520 * N - 7 = 7 ^ (a + 1) * q := by
  have h7 : 2520 * N - 7 = 7 * (360 * N - 1) := by omega
  rw [h7, heq, pow_succ]
  ring
have hcop : Nat.Coprime (7 ^ (a + 1)) q :=
  Nat.Coprime.pow_left _ (((by norm_num : Nat.Prime 7).coprime_iff_not_dvd).mpr hq7)
have hs7 : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (7 ^ (a + 1)) = a + 2 := by
  rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply, Nat.divisors_prime_pow (by norm_num : Nat.Prime 7), Finset.card_map, Finset.card_range]
have hsigma : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2520 * N - 7) = (a + 2) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 q := by
  rw [hval, ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop, hs7]
rw [hsigma] at hbud
exact hbud

info.lean_statement: ∀ (N B : ℕ), 1 ≤ N → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2520 * N - 7) ≤ B + 7 → ∃ a q : ℕ, 360 * N - 1 = 7 ^ a * q ∧ ¬ 7 ∣ q ∧ (a + 2) * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 q ≤ B + 7

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
